name: Robust Broccoli-Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot or soup pot, sauté chopped onions and minced garlic in olive oil until fragrant.
2. Add the Italian stewed tomatoes, oregano, and rosemary to the pot. Stir well.
3. Simmer the mixture for 5-10 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld together.
4. Add the rinsed white beans and thawed frozen broccoli to the soup. Stir gently.
5. Bring the soup to a boil, then reduce the heat and let it simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Just before serving, stir in the grated Parmesan cheese until well combined.
7. Serve the soup hot with garlic bread on the side.
